q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is file.save(filepath) on line 264, a filesystem write operation that is an irreversible side effect.

mock_guidance.target: Mock the file.save(filepath) call on line 264.
mock_guidance.capture: Capture the filepath argument passed to file.save() to verify it contains path traversal sequences (e.g., '../') derived from the unsanitized request.files['file'].filename.
mock_guidance.fake_behavior: Replace file.save with a no-op or a function that records its argument and returns None, preventing any actual filesystem write.
notes: Provide a mock file object whose .filename attribute contains a path traversal payload (e.g., '../../../etc/passwd').
Assert that the captured filepath argument is not properly restricted to UPLOAD_FOLDER.
Ensure UPLOAD_FOLDER is set to a known value in the test so the full resolved path can be inspected.
